name: Mushroom Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a pan and sauté the shallot, herbs, parsley, and mushrooms for 2-3 minutes. Remove from the pan.
2. In a separate bowl, melt butter and add flour. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
3. Gradually add milk, salt, and pepper to the flour mixture. Return to heat and stir constantly until the mixture boils and thickens. Simmer over low heat for 5-7 minutes.
4. Add the grated parmesan cheese, cream, ground mace, salt, pepper, and egg whites to the sauce mixture. Beat the egg whites until stiff and fold them into the sauce mixture.
5. Pour one-third of the sauce mixture into four soufflé dishes. Sprinkle half the mushroom mixture over it. Repeat with another layer of sauce and mushrooms, followed by a final layer of sauce and grated parmesan cheese.
6. Bake at 190 degrees Celsius for 30-35 minutes.
7. Serve immediately.
